test.name: Detect a stale active plan (recent findings the plan doesn't account for)
test.description: pl_002 (active, for q_001) predates findings it doesn't account for: five sources (src_005-src_009, including Thomas Flynn's 1881 will src_006) were accessed 2026-05-10/12 — after the plan (created 2026-04-28) and its last logged execution (log_005, 2026-05-03) — and remain unextracted with no log_entry_id. pl_002 still has an outstanding planned item (pli_006). Per SKILL.md Step 2 'Stale plans', the skill should flag the plan as predating recent findings and recommend a concrete next step that addresses the new evidence (processing the new sources via record-extraction, and/or revising the plan via research-plan) rather than silently continuing the plan.

input.user_message: Where are we on this project, and what should I do next?

judge_context: Should detect and FLAG that active plan pl_002 is stale: recent findings have arrived that the plan does not account for. Specifically, sources src_005-src_009 were accessed 2026-05-10/2026-05-12 — after the plan (created 2026-04-28) and after its last logged execution (log_005, 2026-05-03) — and are still unextracted (no assertions, no log_entry_id)

Detecting the staleness and surfacing it is the core requirement. The single most important failure mode is silently treating the plan as on-track — e.g. recommending 'execute pli_006' / continue the plan as if nothing changed — without recognizing the newly-arrived sources

The recommended next step must be concrete and grounded in the new findings. EITHER of these is acceptable and should pass: (a) process/extract the new sources (record-extraction), reasonably starting with Thomas Flynn's will (src_006), or (b) revise the plan to account for them (research-plan). Do not penalize the choice between (a) and (b) as long as the recommendation addresses the new evidence
Bonus (not required): noting that the planned probate/will search pli_006 is now partly redundant because Thomas Flynn's will (src_006) is already in hand
Should NOT modify research.json or tree.gedcomx.json — read-only skill
